title: Turnhout, Antwerp — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Turnhout, Antwerp: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Turnhout is a city in Antwerp with a population of 46,000. The capital of the Kempen region, known for its printing and playing card industry, historic castle, and surrounding nature reserves.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
